message:
feat(ui_query): Cx-first list_pane_bookmarks + list_saved_searches (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Expand Cx-first surface into ui_query.rs. Both public async
entry points gain cx siblings — trivial delegates with a
pre-flight checkpoint each.

Additions (strictly additive, asupersync-runtime-gated):

  * `list_pane_bookmarks_with_cx(cx, storage)` — pre-flight
    checkpoint, then delegates to `list_pane_bookmarks`.

  * `list_saved_searches_with_cx(cx, storage)` — pre-flight
    checkpoint, then delegates to `list_saved_searches`.

Rationale: UI surfaces (bookmark picker, saved search
dropdown) frequently fire these queries while the operator is
still interacting. A pre-flight checkpoint lets the UI cheaply
short-circuit when the operator has already cancelled (e.g.
dismissed the picker mid-request). The storage call itself
stays ambient — `StorageHandle` has no `_with_cx` siblings
yet, so full-path cancellation awaits the future storage.rs
trait refactor.

Regression test (new)
`list_pane_bookmarks_with_cx_matches_legacy_on_empty_db`:

  * Opens a fresh empty StorageHandle.
  * Calls BOTH legacy and Cx-first variants for
    `list_pane_bookmarks` AND `list_saved_searches` with a
    fresh `Cx::for_request()`.
  * Asserts:
    - legacy.len() == cx_first.len() (both 0 on empty DB).
    - No error surfaces on either path.

Uses raw `runtime.block_on` harness (matches the `ping_with_cx`
tick-77 pattern) because `ui_query::tests` doesn't have a
run_async_test helper.

Verification (local fork bypass):
  * ui_query:: — 31 passed / 0 failed (tick 82: 30 -> tick 83:
    31, +1 new consolidated parity test covering both new
    entry points)
  * cargo build -p frankenterm-core --lib — clean (38.43s)
  * cargo fmt -p frankenterm-core -- --check — clean

Cx-first ui_query.rs trail COMPLETE — both public async entry
points have cx siblings.

Bead: ft-xbnl0.2.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
